name: Fish–Tail
preceding_figure_names: Closed Telemark, Cross Chasse, Cross Swivel, Forward Lock, Four Quick Run, Progressive Chasse, Running Finish, Running Right Turn, Six Quick Run, Tipple Chasse To Right, V6
following_figure_names: Running Right Turn, Natural Turn And Back Lock, Natural Pivot Turn, Natural Spin Turn, Natural Turn With Hesitation, Natural Turn, Quarter Turn to Right, Forward Lock, Four Quick Run, V6, Tipsy To L
notes: The Fishtail may be danced DW with no turn. Fishtail is often dance after Cross Swivel. After LF back (Lady shapes to L, RF can cross in front of LF)

steps.action: forward in CBMP, outside partner, start turning right, sway, CBM, rise
comments: Motion continues down the floor, don't tracktrack.
Man's body does a pendulum swing from left to right.

steps.action: forward and slightly to side (small step)
comments: Man lowers while staying on toe at beginning of step, and rises out of it into the forward lock, similar to a tipple chasse.

steps.action: back in CBMP, backing DC, start turning right, sway, CBM, rise
comments: Take LF cross right behind RF, do not step too big.
Option - do a big shape/extension (looks like "dipping" Lady, but Man should not "drop" Lady down).
Keep R side connected with Man, do not break at the hip when doing extension.
After moment of large extension, return to "normal" extension to keep balance on next step.
This is more rotation of body, not taking left should down.

steps.action: back and slightly to side (small step)
